response.overview: An Abstract Psychological Thriller detailing the journey of Norah Heart who finds herself trapped in a never ending nightmare after committing suicide. She now lingers in the afterlife searching for her final resting place. This surreal existentialist short art film Directed by Ace Fillmore is accompanied by a haunting musical score from Spencer Mcneil.
response.tagline: A Psychological Thriller detailing the journey of Norah Heart who finds herself trapped in a never ending nightmare after a failed suicide attempt
response.title: Dead Mirror Suite
